title: The Merchant???
description: A suspicious merchant offers counterfeit relics for sale.

options.title: Open Inventory
options.description: Browse and purchase relics from the merchant's inventory at 50 Gold each.

options.title: Throw Foul Potion
options.description: Throw a Foul Potion at the merchant to challenge them to combat.

conditions: Requires at least 100 Gold or a Foul Potion
notes: This is a custom merchant event with a unique merchant interface. The merchant's inventory contains [gold]6 randomly selected[/gold] relics chosen from a pool of 9 fake relics, each costing [gold]50 Gold[/gold] to purchase. The player can also throw a Foul Potion to challenge the merchant to combat. Upon defeating the merchant, the player receives [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] plus all unsold relics from the merchant's inventory (not just the ones purchased).
